title: Kotoamatsukami Obfuscation Config
description: Controls which Kotoamatsukami LLVM passes are active and how they behave when the plugin is loaded via -fpass-plugin=.

target.description: Target architecture hint (e.g. 'arm64', 'x86_64'). Used by some passes for arch-specific codegen.

loopen.description: Loop obfuscation. Injects a Kotoamatsukami_quick_pow helper function and rewrites loop structure.

loopen_x_list.description: Custom exponent list for quick_pow injection.

forObs.description: For-loop obfuscation. Wraps loop bodies with extra iteration logic.

splitBasicBlocks.description: Splits each basic block into N sub-blocks to increase CFG complexity.

split number.description: Number of parts to split each basic block into.

branch2call.description: Converts direct branches to indirect calls (64-bit).

branch2call_32.description: Converts direct branches to indirect calls (32-bit targets).

junkCode.description: Injects dead arithmetic instructions that do not affect semantics.

indirectBranch.description: Replaces direct branch targets with computed indirect branches.

indirectCall.description: Replaces direct function calls with indirect dispatch through function pointers.

bogusControlFlow.description: Inserts opaque predicates and fake branches that are never taken.

substitution.description: Replaces arithmetic/logical operations with semantically equivalent but harder to analyze forms.

flatten.description: Rewrites function CFG into a flat switch-dispatcher loop (OLLVM-style control flow flattening).

gvEncrypt.description: Encrypts global string/variable constants and inserts runtime decryption stubs.

functionList.description: List of function names. [''] means apply to all functions.
